config_metadata.experimentName: A counterfactual simulation model of causal judgments for physical events. (Preliminary Study)
config_metadata.description: Participants watched two-ball collision clips and rated either counterfactual dependence (would the red ball go through the gate without the gray ball) or causal/preventive influence of ball A on ball B.
